source.name: ICI Retirement Statistics — Quarterly Retirement Market Data (design reference)
source.note: EXAMPLE / DESIGN ONLY — illustrative quarterly retirement market asset levels for schema and validator tests. Not used in GhostFlow score or buildSnapshot. Production values and exact ICI table/row names require v1.2c operator verification from the current ICI release (e.g. The US Retirement Market quarterly workbook).

caveats: Structural retirement market assets — not measured payroll contribution flow or weekly equity flow
Quarterly cadence — not comparable to weekly ETF issuance or daily vol inputs
mappingStatus not_final — no score mapping; MOCK retirementFlowPressureProxy unchanged
Illustrative totals only — operator must re-extract from verified ICI rows in v1.2c
